views.markdown: **AntiDarkSword** defends jailbroken devices against WebKit RCE exploits and iMessage zero-click attack chains — including **Coruna**, **DarkSword**, and **BLASTPASS** — at the injection layer before any payload reaches the app.

• **WebKit hardening** — hooks WKWebView, WKWebViewConfiguration, WKPreferences, and WKWebpagePreferences to cut renderer-level attack surface
• **iMessage zero-click blocking** — suppresses IMFileTransfer downloads and risky attachment preview generation (HEIC, HEIF, WebP, PDF)
• **Remote content rules** — WKContentRuleList compiled per-process; default-on for messaging and mail apps
• **User Agent spoofing** — overrides `navigator.userAgent` / `userAgentData` via WKUserScript; presets from iOS 15 → macOS, Android, Windows
• **App extension coverage** — Share, NSE, notification content, and iMessage extensions inherit or override their parent app's rules
• **Corellium VM decoy** — fabricates a plausible stat for `/usr/libexec/corelliumd`, spoofs `kern.osversion`, and neutralises env/path probes
• **Daemon protection** — hooks `imagent`, `identityservicesd`, `apsd`, and `IMDPersistenceAgent` at Level 3
• **TrollFools variant** — substrate-free build; injected per-app, no jailbreak required

| Level | Scope |
|---|---|
| **1** | Browsers, mail, messaging, WebKit-heavy apps |
| **2** | Level 1 + social and media apps |
| **3** | Level 2 + system daemons (iMessage services) |

Custom per-app and per-extension rules override the active level for any bundle ID.

**iOS 13 – 18**

| Package | Jailbreak |
|---|---|
| `iphoneos-arm64` rootless | Dopamine 2, RootHide, palera1n rootless |
| `iphoneos-arm` rootful | palera1n rootful |
| `iphoneos-arm` legacy | Checkra1n, unc0ver, Electra (iOS 13–14) |
| TrollFools dylib | No jailbreak required (iOS 15+) |
